description: ETL & Data Integration pipeline covering connector registration, EP-4 sync saga, webhook HMAC ingestion, backfill, raw→staging transformation, schema drift detection, SCD-2 dimensional modeling, PII-gated mart writes, identity join, cross-flow analytics, reverse ETL via queue fabric, and tenant warehouse provisioning.
entry: ConnectorRegistrationRequested event (tenant registers new data connector)

n1.label: ValidateConnectorRequest
n1.description: Validate connector config, credentials present, required fields, tenant scope

n2.label: RetrieveEtlPatterns
n2.description: RAG retrieval of ETL integration patterns: EP-4 saga cycle, CF-192 zone order, CF-193 cursor monotonic, CF-211 HMAC timing-safe, DR-62 SCD-2, DR-63 PII gate, DR-64 queue-fabric-only

n3.label: DecomposeEtlPipeline
n3.description: Decompose into 12 service tasks: T213 registration → T214 sync saga → T215 webhook → T216 backfill → T217 transform → T218 drift → T219 SCD-2 → T220 mart → T221 identity → T222 cross-flow → T223 reverse → T224 warehouse

n4.label: GenerateConnectorRegistration
n4.description: AI generates T213 ConnectorRegistrationHandler with F430 rate check at ORDER 1, F427 vault at ORDER 2, idempotency at ORDER 3, storeDocument BEFORE enqueue. Content: ConnectorRegistered payload has no credentials — only opaque connectorId. ConnectorRegistrationFailed on any failure path. CF-211 HMAC timing-safe required for T215.

n5.label: ValidateEtlSecurityGates
n5.description: Validate CF-211 timingSafeEqual not ===, CF-192 append-only raw zone, CF-193 monotonic cursor, DR-62 no updateDocument, DR-63 PII gate at ORDER 1, DR-64 no HTTP to SaaS

n6.label: ScoreEtlImplementation
n6.description: Score: CF rules compliance, iron rule ordering, DNA-8 outbox, knowledgeScope PRIVATE on all records

n8.label: StoreFeedback
n8.description: DPO triple: chosen=CF-211-timingSafeEqual + CF-192-append-only + CF-193-monotonic + DR-62-no-updateDocument + DR-63-pii-order-1 + DR-64-queue-fabric-only + DNA-8-store-before-enqueue, rejected=string-equality-hmac OR updateDocument-on-raw OR cursor-non-monotonic OR direct-HTTP-to-SaaS OR enqueue-before-store. Record model, score, CF compliance flags.
n8.discriminatingConstraint: Using === for HMAC comparison (CF-211 violation) OR calling updateDocument on raw zone (CF-192 violation) OR skipping PII gate (DR-63 violation) OR direct HTTP to SaaS for reverse ETL (DR-64 violation) receives score=0 and triggers n3 re-iteration.
